C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc librift.a CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/rift.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/token.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/memory.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/platform.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/lexer.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/parser.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/semantic.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/validator.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/codegen.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/emitter.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/pattern.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/codec/codec.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/codec/targets/emit_c.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/codec/targets/emit_hexdump.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/bridge/bridge.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/bridge/trident.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/bridge/ropen.c.obj CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/raf/raf.c.obj
C:\MinGW\bin\ranlib.exe librift.a
